title: Property-profile API v1: GET /api/v1/properties/{bbl} via pluto-soda connector
objective: Versioned FastAPI endpoint accepting a validated BBL and returning the canonical property profile built from the accepted pluto-soda connector: source facts with full provenance, coverage statuses, explicit unsupported/unknown/conflict/source-unavailable states, bound to the accepted M0-T009 JSON schemas; contract + integration tests; no credential or raw-internal-error exposure; includes the M1-T002 G5 hardening items F1-F4
business_reason: Owner Priority 3: first user-facing property data path; prerequisite for the first browser property screen (Priority 4)
inputs: services/api/app/connectors/pluto_soda.py + bbl.py (accepted M1-T002 connector; error taxonomy: no_match, rate_limited, schema_drift, source_unavailable, timeout, validation_error)
packages/contracts/schemas/v1/property_profile.schema.json, source_fact.schema.json, coverage_status.schema.json, common.schema.json (accepted M0-T009; binding response contracts)

project-control/reports/M1-T002-G3-review.md carry-forwards: treat no_match as a result not an error; persist conflicts/drift_signals/absent_columns/notes into the PRD section-9 model; NEVER map confidence=1.0 to a coverage label (PRD section 12); wire check_columns_for_drift into a monitor hook (stub acceptable, documented)

project-control/reports/M1-T002-G5-security-review.md findings F1-F4 (REQUIRED in this task): F1 bounded response read; F2 catch RecursionError/hostile JSON -> typed error; F3 disable redirects or pin final host in urllib transport; F4 sanitize untrusted errorCode in detail (repr-style). F5: log to_payload(), never formatted tracebacks
PRD section 21 (versioned /api/v1), section 12 (coverage statuses), section 9 (provenance), section 32.3 (canonical profile)
services/api/app/main.py (FastAPI placeholder; this task may now modify it to mount the v1 router)
outputs: services/api/app/profile/builder.py (connector facts -> canonical property-profile document with coverage + completeness statuses)
services/api/app/connectors/pluto_soda.py (G5 F1-F4 hardening only - no redesign)

acceptance_scenarios.expected: 200; body validates against property_profile.schema.json v1; every fact carries provenance refs that resolve (no dangling); coverage statuses present and NEVER derived from connector confidence; profile_version and reproducibility metadata present

acceptance_scenarios.input: decimal-serialized and component-form BBLs; borough 1 and 5 bounds
acceptance_scenarios.expected: canonical 10-digit path only; raw preserved in provenance; consistent 200/404/422 semantics documented in OpenAPI

acceptance_scenarios.input: valid-pattern nonexistent BBL (5999999999); record with absent columns
acceptance_scenarios.expected: 404-or-explicit-no-match response shape (documented choice) with machine-readable state=no_match, condo billing-lot explanation included; absent columns surface as unknown facts, never fabricated
200 with conflict visible in the profile (data_conflict coverage on affected facts); never silently resolved
503-style source_unavailable and 502/424-style responses (documented) with typed machine-readable states; NO stack traces, internals, or token material in any response; drift signalled distinctly

acceptance_scenarios.input: same BBL twice on fixture transport
acceptance_scenarios.expected: identical profile documents (stable ordering/keys) modulo retrieval timestamps

acceptance_scenarios.input: G5 F1-F4 verification: oversized response body, deeply nested JSON, cross-host redirect, CRLF errorCode
acceptance_scenarios.expected: bounded read enforced; typed error not RecursionError; token never follows a cross-host redirect; detail fields sanitized; all with tests
all M1-T002 connector tests still pass (101+); validate_contracts 0 failures; no contract files modified

risks: Profile document must be the canonical contract (PRD 32.3) - no competing schema; if property_profile.schema.json v1 lacks a needed field, STOP and report (contract changes are a separate task)
Coverage labels: connector facts are unreviewed source facts - nothing may be labeled verified (PRD 12); expected statuses are conditional/unsupported/data_conflict/not_applicable classes only
This endpoint has no auth yet (M0-T007/T008 blocked on Supabase token) - must be clearly marked internal/dev, not exposed publicly, and documented as a G5 condition
Low disk: source-only edits; tests offline; CI runs the suite

progress_log.message: Producer done, committed 555db54; orchestrator re-ran 140 tests + ruff + scan; G3/G5 dispatching

G3 PASS + G5 PASS recorded. BLOCKING before merge: G3 defect D1 (builder/hook exceptions escape the documented 500 contract) must be fixed + tested. Post-merge follow-ups recorded: contract v1.1 task (additive keys documentation, MANDATORY before Priority 4 consumes them), missing_inputs filter policy, G5 N1 boundary sanitization, N2 render.yaml health-path reconciliation. No-auth G5 condition: endpoint INTERNAL/DEV until B-001 auth lands.
